headline: Why is CoStar Group (CSGP) Inspiring Analysts’ Confidence
summary: CoStar Group Inc. (NASDAQ:CSGP) is one of BlackRock’s 30 most important AI stocks right now. BlackRock is the second-largest institutional owner in the company, holding approximately 33.81 million shares worth slightly over a billion dollars, or around 8.3% of outstanding shares, according to Yahoo Finance data.
